ddls:
CREATE TABLE "levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the level */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the level was last updated */,
  "level_type" TEXT /* Type of the level (e.g., tutorial, boss, puzzle) */,
  "difficulty_rating" REAL /* Difficulty rating of the level */,
  "estimated_completion_time" INTEGER /* Estimated time to complete the level */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the level */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_levels_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_levels_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enemies" (
  "enemy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enemy */,
  "enemy_name" TEXT /* Name of the enemy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the enemy */,
  "damage_dealt" REAL /* Average damage the enemy can deal */,
  "health_points" INTEGER /* Health points of the enemy */,
  "difficulty" REAL /* Difficulty level of the enemy */,
  "enemy_type" TEXT /* Type of the enemy (e.g., melee, ranged, magic) */,
  "spawn_rate" REAL /* Frequency of enemy appearance */,
  "drop_rate" REAL /* Probability of dropping items */,
  "movement_speed" REAL /* Speed at which the enemy moves */,
  "attack_speed" REAL /* Speed at which the enemy attacks */,
  "special_abilities" TEXT /* JSON field to store special abilities of the enemy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enemy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "level_enemies" (
  "level_enemy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level-enemy relationship */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the level */,
  "enemy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enemy */,
  "number_of_enemies" INTEGER /* Number of enemies of this type in the level */,
  "damage_to" REAL /* Average damage dealt to the player by this enemy */,
  "damage_of" REAL /* Average damage dealt by the player to this enemy */,
  "dpt_t" REAL /* Damage per turn (DPT) for the player */,
  "dpt_e" REAL /* Damage per turn (DPT) for the enemy */,
  "difficulty" REAL /* Difficulty of the encounter with this enemy */,
  "hp_loss" REAL /* Health points lost by the player in this encounter */,
  "spawn_points" TEXT /* JSON field to store spawn points of enemies in the level */,
  "enemy_behavior" TEXT /* JSON field to store behavior patterns of enemies */,
  "environmental_factors" TEXT /* JSON field to store environmental factors affecting enemies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_enemy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_level_enemies_enemy_id FOREIGN KEY ("enemy_id") REFERENCES enemies ("enemy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_level_enemies_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., game designer, data analyst, project manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON field to store user permissions */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
